name: PR-SOURCES.yaml registry lives at the operator path .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []\noperator_namespace: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/show-registry-path.sh" 2>out.txt && grep -q '.claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
